name: statspro
description: A retro token health bar for Claude Code. Always-on status bar strip + animated webview showing token usage, model, and your 5-hour window.

statspro.plan.markdownDescription: Your Claude plan — sets the 5-hour token budget. `auto` (default) detects it from Claude Code's own config. Presets (rough estimates): `pro` ≈ 1M, `max5x` ≈ 5M, `max20x` ≈ 10M. `custom` uses `#statspro.tokenBudget5h#`.

statspro.tokenBudget5h.markdownDescription: Custom 5-hour token budget. Only used when `#statspro.plan#` is `custom`.

statspro.windowHours.description: Length of the rolling usage window, in hours.

statspro.refreshSeconds.description: How often to recompute usage, in seconds.

statspro.slots.markdownDescription: The three readouts. Each is one of: `model`, `tokens_total`, `tokens_5h`, `time_left_5h`, `tok_per_min`, `context`.
